prompt: Write acceptance criteria for an API rate limiting feature. The system should limit API requests to 100 per minute per API key, with a sliding window. When the limit is exceeded, return 429 Too Many Requests with a Retry-After header. Premium users get 1000 requests per minute. Rate limit info should be returned in response headers (X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset).
assertions: Output uses Given/When/Then format with AC-N numbering
Includes AC for normal request under limit (happy path)
Includes AC for request when limit is exceeded (429 response)
Includes AC for Retry-After header correctness
Includes AC for premium user higher limit (1000/min)
Includes AC for rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset)
Includes AC for edge case: sliding window reset behavior
Includes AC for missing or invalid API key
At least 8 distinct acceptance criteria are defined
